title: Teltonika TSW040 8-port PoE+ Switch
description: The TSW040 is an unmanaged 8-port PoE+ switch by Teltonika, featuring eight RJ45 ports with a total power budget of 240 W , or up to 30 W per port. This compact and rugged 8-port switch also features a 2-pin power input and an integrated DIN rail for easy mounting, making it ideal for industrial applications. The TSW040 has a wide voltage range of 7-57 VDC and a PoE-out voltage range of 44-57 VDC Note that TSW040 PoE ports works properly when switch is powered using PSU, which can supply 44-57 VDC. If TSW040 switch is powered with voltages ranging from 7 VDC to 43 VDC, it will work as standard switch, without PoE capabilities Device QSG (Quick Start Guide) Packaging box
